title: Property Consultant - My Home Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - My Home Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
